name: Asx Limited
analysis: ASX has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (0.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$51.4800, stop A$46.3815, target A$57.1801 (1.12:1) — then trail it.
